metadata.title: Leeks with miso and chive salsa
metadata.description: The punchy salsa is the star here, pairing wonderfully well with the mild sweetness of the leeks. The fried leek tops and garlic add aroma and crunch, and the salsa can also be used to dress various dishes.

ingredientsList.name: fresh ginger, peeled and roughly chopped
mixed black and white sesame seeds, very well toasted

subRecipes.title: Leeks with miso and chive salsa

steps.action: Remove and discard the tough outer layers of the leeks then wash the leeks well to remove any grit. Cut off and reserve the darker green tops of the leeks so each leek is about 22cm long.
Finely slice 60g of the reserved green leek tops into 8cm-long, thin strips. Rinse very well to remove any grit, then dry thoroughly and set aside.

output.description: Green leek tops sliced and dried

steps.action: For the salsa, pound the ginger and 1/4 teaspoon of flaked salt into a paste using a pestle and mortar. Put into a small bowl along with all the remaining salsa ingredients, stir well to combine, and set aside.

Half fill a pot with lightly salted water and place on a medium-high heat. Once simmering, add the leeks and reduce the heat to medium. Place a lid smaller than the saucepan on top of the leeks, weighing them down. Simmer gently for 20 minutes, or until a knife goes through easily but they still hold their shape. Transfer the leeks to a colander and stand them vertically so they drain thoroughly.

Put the sunflower oil into a medium, high-sided saucepan on a medium-high heat and line a plate with kitchen paper. Toss the dried, sliced green leek tops with 1 teaspoon of cornflour. Once the oil is very hot, add the leek tops and fry for about 2 minutes, until golden and crispy. Transfer to the paper-lined plate with a slotted spoon and sprinkle with some flaked salt. Toss the garlic with the remaining 1/4 teaspoon of cornflour and fry for about a minute, until crisp and golden-brown. Add to the fried leeks and sprinkle with flaked salt.
Arrange the leeks on a large plate and spoon over the miso salsa. Drizzle over the olive oil and top with the fried leeks and garlic. Sprinkle with the extra chives and serve.

output.description: Leeks with miso salsa and fried toppings ready to serve
